message.reasoning:
We need to output a JSON response with kind:tool_call perhaps? Actually we are supposed to gather exact evidence needed before editing schema definitions, so likely need to list or read something else? The base instruction: Gather exact evidence needed before editing schema definitions so artifacts stay versioned and aligned. We already read artifacts.rs and searched for schema version definitions. We need to maybe provide evidence of those constants? The response contract: Return JSON only with this exact shape: {"kind":"think|tool_call|complete","prompt_version":"v1","model_slug":"<provider model id>","provider":"<provider slug>","assistant_message":"<brief status>","tool_call":{"tool_name":"<one registered tool name>","payload":{}},"acquired_fact_ids":["<fact id>"],"readiness_state":"not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit"}. Use null or omit tool_call unless kind is tool_call. When kind is tool_call, tool_call.tool_name must exactly match one of the registered tool names.

We currently have evidence from searching that we have schema version constants. The readiness_state likely "evidence_acquired"? We need to output JSON with appropriate fields. Since we are not performing a new tool call? Maybe we can call "complete" with readiness_state ready_to_edit? But we haven't yet edited. Probably need to indicate that evidence gathered and we are ready to edit. So kind:complete? Actually response contract includes kind can be "think|tool_call|complete". If we are done and ready to edit, we could set kind:"complete" and readiness_state:"ready_to_edit"? The readiness_state field indicates not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit. Probably "ready_to_edit". Provide tool_call maybe none (null). Since kind is not tool_call, we can omit tool_call. So output JSON with kind:"complete"? The shape says kind:"think|tool_call|complete". So we can set kind:"complete". Provide prompt_version, model_slug, provider, assistant_message, tool_call omitted, acquired_fact_ids list maybe empty or include some fact IDs? We could include fact ids like "artifacts_schema_version_constants". But we need to provide actual fact IDs; we haven't stored any. Could leave empty array [].

Make sure JSON is valid and no extra fields.

Thus:

{
  "kind":"complete",
  "prompt_version":"v1",
  "model_slug":"graphbench-core",
  "provider":"graphbench",
  "assistant_message":"Schema version constants gathered; ready to edit",
  "acquired_fact_ids":[]
}

But we also need readiness_state field. Yes include "ready_to_edit". So:

{
  "kind":"complete",
  "prompt_version":"v1",
  "model_slug":"graphbench-core",
  "provider":"graphbench",
  "assistant_message":"Schema version constants confirmed; ready to edit",
  "acquired_fact_ids":[],
  "readiness_state":"ready_to_edit"
}

Make sure no tool_call. Ensure JSON only.
